channel.title: Tips on Nilam's Page
channel.description: Recent content in Tips on Nilam's Page

item.title: 5 Fun Math Tricks to Impress Your Friends
item.description: 5 Fun Math Tricks to Impress Your Friends Math doesn’t have to be boring! Here are 5 amazing mental math tricks that will make you look like a math wizard. 🧙‍♀️ Trick 1: Multiply by 11 (Two-Digit Numbers) The Secret: Split the digits and put their sum in the middle! Example: 35 × 11 Split: 3 __ 5 Add digits: 3 + 5 = 8 Answer: 385 ✨ Try it: 52 × 11 = ?
